title: Meta-Mathematics Deep II: Gödel, Large Cardinals & Consistency Hierarchies

diagonal_lemma.eml_depth_of_truth: ∞ (G is true but unprovable in PA)
diagonal_lemma.reason: Self-reference creates EML-∞ barrier: no EML-finite proof exists

completeness_spectrum.Fermat's_Last_Theorem: EML-2 (provable in ZFC, requires modular forms)
completeness_spectrum.Consistency_of_ZFC: EML-∞ (unprovable in ZFC by Gödel II)
completeness_spectrum.P_vs_NP: EML-∞ (unknown, conjectured independent of weak systems)

godel_incompleteness.key_insight: Gödel construction is EML-0; the resulting truth is EML-∞ (beyond formal reach)

large_cardinal_hierarchy.name: Mahlo
large_cardinal_hierarchy.definition: κ: inaccessible, stationary set of inaccessibles below κ

large_cardinal_hierarchy.name: Woodin
large_cardinal_hierarchy.definition: κ: for all A⊆Vκ, ∃ α<κ with j:Vα→Vα with crit(j)>α

large_cardinal_hierarchy.name: Supercompact
large_cardinal_hierarchy.definition: κ: for all λ, ∃ elementary embedding j:V→M with M closed under λ-sequences

reflection_principle.principle: For large enough κ: (Vκ, ∈) ⊨ φ iff V ⊨ φ
reflection_principle.eml_interpretation: Reflection = EML-0 (structural) but size requirement = EML-∞

large_cardinals.key_insight: Each large cardinal level is EML-∞ relative to all lower levels

big_five_systems.name: RCA₀
big_five_systems.reason: Computable = EML-2 (all computable functions are EML-finite)

big_five_systems.name: WKL₀
big_five_systems.reason: Compactness = EML-2 (covers by finitely many open sets)

big_five_systems.name: ACA₀
big_five_systems.proves: Bolzano-Weierstrass for ℝ, Ramsey's theorem for pairs

reverse_mathematics.key_boundary: RCA₀ / WKL₀ / ACA₀ = EML-2; ATR₀ / Π¹₁-CA₀ = EML-∞
reverse_mathematics.key_insight: The RCA₀-ACA₀ boundary is EML-2; crossing into ATR₀ = crossing into EML-∞

eml_depth_summary.EML-0: Syntactic construction (Gödel diagonal), topological graph invariants
eml_depth_summary.EML-1: No natural mathematical object at this level in foundations
eml_depth_summary.EML-2: Computable mathematics (RCA₀, WKL₀, ACA₀), Gödel numbering, arithmetic hierarchy
eml_depth_summary.EML-3: No natural example in pure foundations
eml_depth_summary.EML-\u221e: Gödel sentences, consistency statements, large cardinals, independence results, ATR₀+

key_theorem: The EML Foundational Depth Theorem: Mathematics bifurcates at EML-∞: All computable/constructive mathematics (PA through ACA₀) is EML-2. The moment of Gödel incompleteness — the Gödel sentence G — is EML-∞: it is true but lies beyond every EML-finite formal system. The large cardinal hierarchy is an ascending tower of EML-∞ levels, each strictly stronger than all previous. There is no ceiling: for every EML-∞ system T, Con(T) is EML-∞ relative to T.
rabbit_hole_log: Gödel numbering cost = n*log(n): EML-2 (encoding complexity)
Diagonal lemma: purely syntactic = EML-0; the resulting truth = EML-∞
Computable mathematics = EML-2: this is the Computable Reals = EML-finite theorem (S69)
PA < ZFC < ZFC+Inaccessible: each step requires EML-∞ reasoning
Transfinite recursion (ATR₀): ordinal iteration = EML-∞ (same as transfinite ordinals)
No EML-3 in foundations: the gap between EML-2 (computable) and EML-∞ (formal limits)

connections.S69_algo_random: Computable reals = EML-2; non-computable (Chaitin Ω) = EML-∞
connections.S58_topology: Consistency strength ordering = linear order (EML-0 structure on EML-∞ levels)
connections.S129_metamath_deep: Extends Gödel/Gentzen from Session 129 with large cardinals
